name: Cottage Cheese Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Prepare crust and set aside.
3. In a medium bowl, beat egg yolks until light. Blend in salt, lemon juice, vanilla, almond extract, sugar, sifted flour, and lemon peel.
4. Add cottage cheese into a large bowl. Mix in a small amount of egg yolk mixture.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry. Fold into the cheese mixture.
6. Stir in sour cream; beat until blended.
7. Pour into crust.
8. Bake for 1 hour.
9. Top with Strawberry Glaze and fresh strawberries if desired. Refrigerate for 5 hours before serving.
